'''patoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squadrista|squadrista]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squadrista|squadrista]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| patoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæteheth|pæteheth]] || [[word:pætehej|pætehej]] || [[word:pætehesh|pætehesh]] || [[word:pætehe|pætehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:patotohoth|patotohoth]] || [[word:patotohoj|patotohoj]] || [[word:patotohosh|patotohosh]] || [[word:patotoho|patotoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:patohoth|patohoth]] || [[word:patohoj|patohoj]] || [[word:patohosh|patohosh]] || [[word:patoho|patoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:patofhoth|patofhoth]] || [[word:patofhoj|patofhoj]] || [[word:patofhosh|patofhosh]] || [[word:patofhof|patofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:patohotho|patohotho]] || [[word:patohojo|patohojo]] || [[word:patohosho|patohosho]] || [[word:patohoko|patohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:patohoth|patohoth]] || [[word:patohoj|patohoj]] || [[word:patohosh|patohosh]] || [[word:patoho|patoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:patohothol|patohothol]] || [[word:patohojol|patohojol]] || [[word:patohoshol|patohoshol]] || [[word:patohokol|patohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:patohothotho|patohothotho]] || [[word:patohojojo|patohojojo]] || [[word:patohoshosho|patohoshosho]] || [[word:patohoko|patohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:patohothon|patohothon]] || [[word:patohojon|patohojon]] || [[word:patohoshon|patohoshon]] || [[word:patohokon|patohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:patohothoro|patohothoro]] || [[word:patohojoro|patohojoro]] || [[word:patohoshoro|patohoshoro]] || [[word:patohokoro|patohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
